texto: Speech is for the convenience of those who are hard of hearing
autor: but there are many fine things which we cannot say if we have to shout.
explicacao: Citação de but there are many fine things which we cannot say if we have to shout. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Speech is for the convenience of those who are hard of hearing” articula reflexao, henry-david-thoreau, speech em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
